missions.title: Mastery Module 1: Centre of mass definition and Related Concepts
missions.description: Comprehensive analysis covering centre of mass definition, COM of two particle system, COM of continuous bodies and advanced applications.

microtargets.title: Centre of mass definition
ncertAnchors: NCERT Physics Class 11, Chapter: Rotational Motion, Section detailing Centre of mass definition
mustKnowFacts: A thorough understanding of Centre of mass definition is frequently appears in NEET examinations.
Applying the core principles of Centre of mass definition correctly is essential for solving integrated numerical and conceptual problems in Rotational Motion.
commonTraps: Misinterpreting the advanced application scenarios of Centre of mass definition during high-pressure exam scenarios.
Failing to recall the exact conditions or sign conventions associated with Centre of mass definition.
masteryCriteria: Understands and can apply concepts of Centre of mass definition.
Successfully avoids common pitfalls when Centre of mass definition is integrated with other concepts in Rotational Motion.
pyqPatterns: NEET PyQs emphasize the application of Centre of mass definition in tricky assertion-reason or statement-based questions.

activeRecallQuestions.question: Explain an application where using the concept of Centre of mass definition can lead to a common student error.
